steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The blank describes the Spanish influence on California architecture. The clue: "architectural tourists...can easily recognize how its style draws inspiration from the Spanish missions." The word must mean clearly and obviously noticeable.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A. Palpable means so strong it can almost be touched — clearly perceptible. Substituting: "an influence that is palpable throughout the state" — tourists can easily recognize it, confirming it is obviously felt. A is correct.

B. Understated means subtle or downplayed. The passage says people can easily recognize the influence — the opposite of understated. Eliminated.

C. Corroborated means confirmed by additional evidence. An influence cannot corroborate itself; the word doesn't describe how widespread or visible the influence is. Eliminated.

D. Disputed means contested or debated. The passage presents the influence as straightforwardly visible, not controversial. Eliminated.
